examples: The seas around Bermuda are full of colourful corals and fantastic fish.
Colourful streamers and paper decorations had been hung from the ceiling.
The story she told was certainly colourful, and extended over her life in England, Germany, and Spain.
As you drive north, look out for colourful wood-carved totem poles rising out of the ground.
To complete the cheerful display, chefs also added about 2, 000lb of hard-drying icing and colourful candy.
